news_headline: Weekly Gaza casualties: 23 Palestinians killed and 112 injured in the last week of June
news_summary: UN OCHA reported 23 Palestinians killed and 112 injured between 24 and 30 June 2026 in Gaza, citing the Gaza Ministry of Health.
citation_text: OCHA's 3 July 2026 Humanitarian Situation Report documents 23 Palestinians killed, 1 body retrieved, 1 person died of wounds, and 112 injured between 24 and 30 June, citing MoH figures.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-001.

news_headline: Fifth-grade child dies from airstrike injuries near a learning space
news_summary: A fifth-grade child died from injuries sustained during an airstrike on 23 June near a temporary education learning space in Gaza.
citation_text: OCHA reported that a fifth-grade child died from injuries sustained during an airstrike on 23 June near a temporary education learning space.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-003; child_flag set in persons per_003.

news_headline: 17-year-old girl killed on way to high school exam
news_summary: A 17-year-old girl was killed by Israeli forces on her way to sit for a high school exam in the West Bank.
citation_text: OCHA reported that Israeli forces killed three Palestinians (including one child) during raids and search operations in the West Bank between 23 and 29 June.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-004; child_flag set in persons per_004.

news_headline: 1,109 Palestinians killed in the West Bank since 7 October 2023
news_summary: Cumulative OCHA-recorded figure: 1,109 Palestinians (at least 243 children) killed in the West Bank including East Jerusalem between 7 October 2023 and 29 June 2026.
citation_text: UNRWA Situation Report #229: 1,109 Palestinians (at least 243 of them children) killed in the West Bank including East Jerusalem between 7 October 2023 and 29 June 2026.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-031.

news_headline: 1,053 fatalities recorded in Gaza since ceasefire despite continued strikes
news_summary: Cumulative figure from the 10 October 2025 ceasefire through 30 June 2026: 1,053 fatalities and 3,406 injuries from continued airstrikes, shelling, and gunfire.
citation_text: UNRWA Situation Report #229: 1,053 fatalities and 3,406 injuries recorded from continued Israeli airstrikes, shelling, and gunfire despite the ceasefire.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-032.

news_headline: Aid logistics driver killed on Kerem Shalom to Gaza warehouse route
news_summary: A driver working for a World Central Kitchen logistics partner was killed by Israeli forces while transporting aid goods in an access-restricted area.
citation_text: OCHA oPt Humanitarian Situation Report covering 29 June - 5 July 2026: a WCK logistics partner driver was killed while transporting aid goods in an access-restricted area.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-029; entity ENT-P1-05 World Central Kitchen.

news_headline: Four-month-old infant dies after delayed transfer at Ramallah road gate
news_summary: A four-month-old Palestinian infant's transfer to hospital was delayed at an Israeli-staffed road gate near Ramallah; the infant later died at the hospital.
citation_text: OCHA oPt Humanitarian Situation Report covering 29 June - 5 July 2026: movement restrictions at an Israeli-staffed road gate near Ramallah delayed a four-month-old infant's hospital transfer.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-033.

news_headline: Over 9,000 chickenpox cases recorded across 130 Gaza health facilities
news_summary: Deteriorating environmental conditions and overcrowding drove more than 9,000 chickenpox cases across 130+ health facilities in Gaza in two weeks.
citation_text: OCHA reported that in just two weeks, over 9,000 cases of chickenpox were recorded across more than 130 health facilities in Gaza.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-008.

news_headline: 42,000 people assisted with a month of food across Al Obeid
news_summary: ICRC reported that 42,000 people were assisted with a month's worth of food across camps and urban settlements in Al Obeid.
citation_text: ICRC reported that 42,000 people were assisted with a month's worth of food across camps and urban settlements in Al Obeid.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-021.

news_headline: Over 7,000 children and lactating women receive nutritional supplements
news_summary: Nutritional supplements were distributed to over 7,000 children and pregnant and lactating women in Al Obeid food assistance.
citation_text: ICRC reported that nutritional supplements were distributed to over 7,000 children and pregnant and lactating women.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-021; child_flag set in persons per_007.

news_headline: Over 850 weapon-wounded patients treated at Al Obeid Teaching Hospital
news_summary: More than 850 weapon-wounded patients were treated at Al Obeid Teaching Hospital since the beginning of the year.
citation_text: ICRC reported that more than 850 weapon-wounded patients were treated at Al Obeid Teaching Hospital since the beginning of the year.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-022; entity ENT-P2-06 Al Obeid Teaching Hospital.

news_headline: Cholera-prevention and sanitation activities for 6,000 displaced households
news_summary: ICRC documented cholera-prevention and sanitation activities for 6,000 displaced households in Al Obeid displacement sites.
citation_text: ICRC documented that cholera-prevention and sanitation activities are being conducted for 6,000 displaced households.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-023.

news_headline: Rehabilitated water infrastructure to serve ~2.4 million in Khartoum
news_summary: Rehabilitated water pumps and treatment equipment are expected to provide safe water access to approximately 2.4 million people in Khartoum state.
citation_text: ICRC reported rehabilitation and donation of water pumps and treatment equipment expected to provide safe water access to approximately 2.4 million people in Khartoum state.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-030 (2025 impact summary).

news_headline: 36 trained Red Crescent volunteers deployed across 12 displacement sites
news_summary: ICRC reported that 36 trained Red Crescent volunteers are deployed across 12 displacement sites in Al Obeid providing first aid.
citation_text: ICRC reported that 36 trained Red Crescent volunteers are deployed across 12 displacement sites in Al Obeid.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-025; entity ENT-P2-02 Sudanese Red Crescent.

news_headline: ACLED records sustained heavy clashes in Khartoum with civilian displacement
news_summary: ACLED reported sustained heavy clashes in Khartoum resulting in large-scale displacement and reports of civilian casualties; exact figures vary across sources.
citation_text: ACLED reported sustained heavy clashes in Khartoum resulting in large-scale displacement and reports of civilian casualties.
notes: Linked to estimated event EVT-027.

news_headline: Displaced families flee Al Fasher hostilities to Tawila town
news_summary: Hundreds of displaced families fled hostilities and violence in Al Fasher, seeking shelter in Tawila town in North Darfur.
citation_text: ICRC reported that hundreds of displaced families fled hostilities and violence in Al Fasher, seeking shelter in Tawila town.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-026.

news_headline: Iran war death toll reaches 1,190 (HRANA)
news_summary: HRANA reported 1,190 killed (436 civilians, 435 military, 319 unconfirmed) and 4,475 injured in the Iran-Israel Twelve-Day War as of 28 June 2025.
citation_text: HRANA comprehensive report: 1,190 killed, 4,475 injured; breakdown 436 civilians, 435 military, 319 unconfirmed.
notes: Linked to EVT-002.

news_headline: Iran raises official death toll to 1,060 (Health Ministry / AP)
news_summary: Iranian Ministry of Health raised the official war death toll to 1,060 with 4,000+ wounded; AP reported the figure on 8 July 2025.
citation_text: AP: Iran raised official death toll from war with Israel to 1,060 (8 July 2025).
notes: Linked to EVT-001.

news_headline: Top Iranian commanders killed in Tehran strike
news_summary: Israeli strike on a Tehran command center killed IRGC leadership including Mohammad Bagheri, Hossein Salami, Amir Ali Hajizadeh and Gholam Ali Rashid.
citation_text: ACLED/HRANA: strike killed most of IRGC Aerospace Force leadership and senior commanders.
notes: Linked to EVT-003; persons rows per_1..per_4.

news_headline: Nearly 360 Israeli strikes across 27 Iranian provinces
news_summary: ACLED recorded nearly 360 Israeli attacks across 27 Iranian provinces over 12 days, with over 150 strikes on military targets.
citation_text: ACLED Iran war updates: ~360 Israeli attacks across 27 provinces.
notes: Linked to EVT-004.
